pi_items.metadata_value: Mary Shelley, Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus (1818), Project Gutenberg
pi_items.verified_value: Mary Shelley, Frankenstein; or, The Modern Prometheus (1818), Project Gutenberg
pi_items.source: Manual verification of text content against Frankenstein

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the target Calligra Words document is synthetically generated via a python ODF script with precisely constructed deliberate formatting errors. The verified expected chapter headings are exactly 6 ('Letter 1', 'Letter 2', 'Letter 3', 'Letter 4', 'Chapter 1', 'Chapter 2'). Verified the presence of 4 paragraphs with wrong font (Comic Sans MS) and 3 with wrong alignment (centered). Confirmed 5 specific phrases ('Ancient Mariner', 'Prometheus', 'what can stop the determined heart', 'paradise of my own creation', 'tabula rasa') are deliberately lacking italics, and 3 words ('supernatural', 'electricity', 'magnetism') have incorrect bold styles. Also verified the expected content keywords ('St. Petersburgh', 'North Pacific Ocean', 'Margaret Saville', 'natural philosophy', 'Cornelius Agrippa', 'galvanism') and 3 specific body alignment sample phrases are embedded within the text.
